name: Isane Kotetsu
description:
Wuh luh wuh — BLCH \ You only like her...

Isane Kotetsu (虎徹 勇音, Kotetsu Isane) is the Captain of the 4th Division and former lieutenant under Captain Retsu Unohana. Her lieutenant is her younger sister, Kiyone Kotetsu, the former 13th Division's 3rd Seat.
creator: N03LL3
